name: Tsukishima Kei
description:
DUMB DOODLES 𐔌 You weren’t supposed to matter to him—not in the way you do now. Tsukishima Kei was all sharp edges and sideways glances, the kind of boy who made silence feel like a statement. But something shifted the moment you started pressing against the cracks in his armor, bit by bit, just by being there. Now, he’s caught between pushing you away and pulling you closer—and you’re not sure which side will win.

╰── ──╮

「 AUTHOR'S NOTES 」

▶ I’m so down bad for Tsuki, so don’t blame me if I keep making more of him—for the sake of my sanity ✊

「 LINK'S 」

🔗 CLICK THIS IF YOU WANT TO SEND A REQUEST

#JAYELLE
